must_detect.matched_text: HR onboarding forms (Schedule 2) mark “required” fields only; retention set to five (5) years per BIR and DOLE guidance; minimisation is implemented by default; no early erasure is required by law.

Incident status: no data breach, no cross-border transfer failure, and no erasure backlog exist as of the date hereof; references to “deletion,” “export,” and “consent” in templates are policy statements, not live events.
Post-closing: issuer to file updated General Information Sheet and share listing notices with the SEC and PSE within prescribed periods; registrars and transfer agents to update records.

Proposed minority investment term sheet between Bayan Delta Holdings, Inc. (investor) and IslaTech Utilities Corp. (issuer), a Philippine corporation.
Structure: subscription to preferred shares convertible into common, subject to SEC clearance; pricing to be based on a board-approved formula referencing PSE VWAP; no amounts stated herein.
Conditions precedent: SEC/SRC compliance, PSE-related approvals, corporate approvals, no material adverse change, and completion of confirmatory diligence limited to anonymised datasets.
Public disclosure: issuer confirms material terms were announced via SEC Form 17-C and PSE EDGE on 15 Jan 2024; this document contains no material non-public information.
Data protection: parties adopt Data Processing Agreement (DPA) Schedule 1, forming part of this term sheet; processing will follow RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act) and NPC issuances.
Cross-border transfer (intentional positive): NPC data-export approval Ref. PH-NPC/DEX-0099 for HR payroll processing with CloudHarbor Pte. Ltd. (SG) was granted and logged on 02 Feb 2024; transfers are limited to payroll identifiers and are encrypted.
HR onboarding forms (Schedule 2) mark “required” fields only; retention set to five (5) years per BIR and DOLE guidance; minimisation is implemented by default; no early erasure is required by law.
DSAR and erasure controls: standard request form and SOP appended in Schedule 3; there are no outstanding DSARs or erasure requests; the last completed request is recorded in the compliance log.
Consent withdrawal: employees and investors may withdraw consent via privacy@islatech.example.ph or the self-service portal; no pending withdrawal affects transaction-critical processing.
Settlement mechanics: cash funded via PESONet/PhilPaSS-RTGS to issuer’s escrow with Rural Capital Bank (fictional); generic banking form fields include “Account Name,” “Bank Code (e.g., 000-ABC-000),” and “Branch,” for illustration only.
Diligence data room: access is role-based; only pseudonymised HR and customer samples are provided; no direct personal identifiers or account numbers are viewable by the investor.
Incident status: no data breach, no cross-border transfer failure, and no erasure backlog exist as of the date hereof; references to “deletion,” “export,” and “consent” in templates are policy statements, not live events.
Post-closing: issuer to file updated General Information Sheet and share listing notices with the SEC and PSE within prescribed periods; registrars and transfer agents to update records.
Miscellaneous: Philippine law governs; no exclusivity or break fee; this term sheet is non-binding except for dispute resolution and costs; inquiries may be sent to investor-relations@bayandelta.example.ph.
